# Ruby (Plugin)

The Ruby emitter generates [Sorbet](https://sorbet.org/)-compatible `.rbi` type signature files.

> **Note:** This is a plugin emitter. It must be built and installed as a shared library before use.

## Quick Start

```rust
#[derive(TypeWriter)]
#[sync_to(ruby)]
pub struct User {
    pub id: String,
    pub name: String,
    pub age: Option<u32>,
}
```

Output (`user.rbi`):

```ruby
# typed: strict
# Auto-generated by typewriter v0.5.2. DO NOT EDIT.

class User < T::Struct
  const :id, String
  const :name, String
  const :age, T.nilable(Integer), default: nil
end
```

## Type Mappings

| Rust | Ruby/Sorbet |
|------|-------------|
| `String` | `String` |
| `bool` | `T::Boolean` |
| `u32`, `i64`, etc. | `Integer` |
| `f64` | `Float` |
| `Option<T>` | `T.nilable(T)` |
| `Vec<T>` | `T::Array[T]` |
| `HashMap<K, V>` | `T::Hash[K, V]` |
| `Uuid` | `String` |
| `DateTime` | `Time` |

## Enum Mapping

- **Unit enums** → `T::Enum` with `enums do` block
- **Complex enums** → Sealed `module` with `T::Struct` subclasses

## Configuration

```toml
[ruby]
output_dir = "./generated/ruby"
file_style = "snake_case"
```

See the full [Ruby Emitter documentation](../../docs/ruby-emitter.md) for more details.
